description: A surrealist drawing or print of a standing male figure in a dark patterned suit with bold diagonal chevron or herringbone stripes. The figure stands frontally with arms slightly extended. The head is rendered as an indistinct, ghostly smudge — almost faceless — with only a faint suggestion of features. The figure wears pointed shoes and the overall effect is eerie and dehumanized. The background is plain white, and the style is characteristic of Roberto Aizenberg's metaphysical surrealism.
